name: Booking Confirmation SMS Templates
description: Templates for confirming booked appointments via SMS. Includes initial confirmation, day-before reminder, and day-of reminder.

initial_confirmation.description: Sent immediately after the appointment is booked and insurance verification is noted.

variants.text: Hi {FirstName}! Your appointment at {ClinicName} - {LocationName} is set for {Date} at {Time}. Our team is verifying your insurance benefits and will follow up with details. Questions? Just reply here!
You're all set, {FirstName}! {Date} at {Time} at our {LocationName} office. We'll verify your insurance and send you all the details soon. Text us anytime if you have questions!

verification_complete.description: Sent after insurance benefits have been verified.

variants.text: Hi {FirstName}! Good news -- your insurance benefits have been verified for your {Date} appointment. Our team will share the details with you. If you have any questions, just reply here!

day_before_reminder.description: Sent the day before the appointment as a reminder.

variants.text: Hi {FirstName}! Just a friendly reminder about your appointment tomorrow at {Time} at {ClinicName} - {LocationName} ({Address}). Please wear comfortable, loose-fitting clothing. See you then!
Hi {FirstName}! Your appointment at {ClinicName} - {LocationName} is tomorrow at {Time}. Can you confirm you'll be there? Just reply YES. If you need to reschedule, let us know!

day_of_reminder.description: Sent the morning of the appointment.

variants.text: Good morning, {FirstName}! We look forward to seeing you today at {Time} at our {LocationName} office. The address is {Address}. See you soon!

reschedule_confirmation.description: Sent when an appointment is rescheduled.

variants.text: Hi {FirstName}! Your appointment has been rescheduled to {NewDate} at {NewTime} at {ClinicName} - {LocationName}. We'll send you a reminder beforehand. Text us if you need anything!

cancellation_confirmation.description: Sent when an appointment is cancelled.

variants.text: Hi {FirstName}, your appointment on {Date} has been cancelled. If you'd like to reschedule, just text us here anytime. We're happy to help!

variable_definitions.Date: Appointment date in friendly format (e.g., 'Wednesday, March 25')
variable_definitions.Address: Full street address of the location
